summary.actionabilityPolicy: Actionable metrics count explicit actionablePick/officialPick/accuracyTargetEligible rows; audits prefer enriched Winner Stack rows when more than one stored prediction exists for a game.

scoreLearning.policy: Learning blends four windows: current 24h, 7-day, 30-day, and season. Current 24h keeps the model responsive; longer windows stabilize signal scoring when sample size is sufficient.
scoreLearning.operationalTagFilterPolicy: Final-gate, provider, model-discipline, and status tags are kept on audit rows for proof, but removed from signal-learning inputs so the model only learns from predictive market/fundamentals signals.

rows.matchup: Boston Red Sox at Los Angeles Angels
San Diego Padres at Los Angeles Dodgers
Minnesota Twins at New York Yankees
New York Mets at Atlanta Braves
St. Louis Cardinals at Chicago Cubs
Philadelphia Phillies at Kansas City Royals
Tampa Bay Rays at Houston Astros
Chicago White Sox at Cleveland Guardians
San Francisco Giants at Colorado Rockies
Toronto Blue Jays at Seattle Mariners

policy: Audit every completed MLB game in the trailing 24 hours. The optimizer target is correct team-winner selection for every individual game; 90% is measured as rolling 24h accuracy across all optimized picks. Signal scoring blends current 24h, 7-day, 30-day, and season audit trends.
